patches.find: inflating the Moon's apparent diameter by the same factor
patches.replace: inflating the Moon's physical diameter by the same factor
patches.rationale: SEC-4.2.7a EXP-276.c3 H1 [moderate]: The Moon's apparent diameter (angular size) is invariant under R_p proportional to h_Moon with totality preservation — section 2.7 correctly ties this to totality preservation. The clause means the Moon's PHYSICAL diameter would have to inflate, not apparent. One-word fix: apparent->physical.
